documentation.title: Validate Wine-Quality

sections.Data Preprocessing: Automated cleaning, missing value handling, duplicate review, and encoding were applied where needed.
sections.Feature Engineering: Remove constant and duplicate columns; Encode categorical variables; Impute missing values; Create derived features for dates and ratios; Scale or normalize numerical features
sections.Model Selection: Random Forest achieved the highest validation score among evaluated candidates.
sections.Evaluation Metrics: Random Forest: 1.0000, Naive Bayes: 1.0000, Logistic Regression: 0.9722, Extra Trees: 0.9722, XGBoost: 0.9722
sections.Explainability Summary: Top drivers: flavanoids (0.105), color_intensity (0.075), alcohol (0.057), proline (0.055), od280/od315_of_diluted_wines (0.052)
sections.Deployment Recommendation: Risk level: Low. Deploy with monitoring and schedule retraining if performance drifts.
sections.Future Improvements: Collect more data, monitor drift, and iterate on feature engineering.
